basics.label: Ph.D. Candidate in Mathematics
basics.summary: Ph.D. candidate at the Southern University of Science and Technology, supervised by Prof. Bingyi Jing. Research interests: AI for molecular modeling and drug discovery, geometric deep learning, and generative modeling.
